art_direction.style: children's picture-book illustration, soft watercolor, pastel palette, warm light, rounded friendly shapes, expressive faces, cozy whimsical environment, safe for young children
negative_rules: photorealistic, horror, scary, violence, text, watermark, logo, extra limbs, deformed face, blurry, dark mood, inconsistent clothing, duplicate characters

characters.name: Mira
characters.species: child or friendly animal, based on the story context
consistency_rules: Keep the same face, outfit colors, size, and friendly expression across scenes.
